news.title: ‘Portfolio assessment’ prompts Ferring to terminate 2 fertility trials
news.snippet: Ferring Pharmaceuticals is halting work on two trials of a phase 1 infertility candidate that together had enrolled 416 patients.

news.title: Epia Neuro launches with BCI device to help stroke patients rework brain signals
news.snippet: Epia Neuro is the latest medtech startup looking to tap the potential of brain-computer interface technology, launching with a device that aims to turn brain signals into digital commands.

news.title: Cancer screening costs rival diagnosis fears as patients fall behind
news.snippet: People in the U.S. are increasingly missing cancer screenings and worry as much about a diagnosis as they do about the cost of screening.

news.title: Premier Radiology acquires teleradiology specialist GLOBIS

news.title: Immunovant’s FcRn inhibitor flunks phase 3 eye disease trials, validating biotech’s waning interest
news.snippet: Immunovant’s first-generation FcRn inhibitor flunked a pair of phase 3 eye disease trials, appearing to end the last hopes of commercializing the drug.

news.title: Alto halts work on PDE4 inhibitor after phase 2 schizophrenia failure
news.snippet: Alto Neurosciences is halting work on its schizophrenia prospect after the brain-penetrant drug flunked a phase 2 study.

news.title: Gilead cancels midstage HIV trial as FDA’s clinical hold remains intact
news.snippet: After the FDA placed two of its next-gen HIV drugs on clinical hold last June, Gilead Sciences has now terminated one of the affected trials.

news.title: Thousands of clinical trial sites impacted by Middle East conflict: report

news.title: Alzheimer's-focused Korsana to use Cyclerion reverse merger to go public
news.snippet: After emerging from stealth last month with $175 million in funding, Korsana Biosciences has wasted no time making its way to the public markets.

news.title: Oric chases Pfizer into phase 3 hailing prostate cancer edge, but investors send stock down
news.snippet: Oric Pharmaceuticals has picked the phase 3 dose for its prostate cancer prospect, barreling into the pivotal program while outlining a claimed edge over Pfizer’s rival candidate.

news.title: Trump slaps 100% duties on imported drugs but leaves plenty of exceptions
news.snippet: The president has rolled out a 100% tariff rate on patented pharmaceutical products and ingredients following a "Section 232" investigation, according to a White House fact sheet.

news.title: Poland, Romania must pay Pfizer $2.2B in fight over contested COVID vaccine doses: Belgian court
news.snippet: A Belgian court ordered Poland and Romania to pay Pfizer for COVID vaccines after the countries had attempted to get out of Europe's massive vaccine procurement deal.

news.title: Glenmark goes direct with new US Ryaltris marketing plan as it drops partner model
news.snippet: Six years after signing a U.S. marketing partnership with Hikma Pharma for its seasonal allergy spray Ryaltris, India’s Glenmark is now going it alone.

news.title: German CDMO Adragos buys French sterile injectables plant from Sanofi
news.snippet: Adragos Pharma, a German CDMO, snapped up one of Europe’s largest sterile injectables production plants for an undisclosed price from Sanofi.

news.title: Lilly answers Novo's GLP-1 pill with highly anticipated FDA nod for Foundayo
news.snippet: The FDA has approved Lilly’s GLP-1 receptor agonist pill as the first new molecular entity cleared under the regulator’s controversial Commissioner's National Priority Voucher program.
